title: No Bedrockk
description: Removes Bedrock so you cant Leak bases on servers like DonutSMP
body:
- 🎭 Features
- ✅ Removes Bedrock and Replaces it to Deepslate Blocks to make sure you dont leak any bases on Stream
- 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps
- 🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
- Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/d96gFRrRRX) for Support
